name: Good Song Club
description: A small social media platform that allows you to share good songs with your friends

name: Concrete 95
description: Concrete 95 is a sound design webapp inspired by Musique Concrete. It allows you to layer synth pads, melodies, and found sound randomly fetched from freesound.org to create a unique, ever-changing soundscape.

name: BPM Game
description: Listen to a metronome and guess the BPM.

name: Dig This
description: Web application that generates a random music recommendation using the Discogs API

name: Mood Palace
description: A web repository that allows me to upload ambient audio for anyone to listen

name: Lever
description: A Figma plugin I built which provides a consistent structure to Figma files.
